sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69225" key="muraloifh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠρ-ᾰλοιφή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n69225.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rubbing with sweet oils</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:177" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.177</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
